revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-195

Alternative term: Uniplanar Filament (G.B.)

A filament in which the different sections or the axes of the coils are all in the same plane.

Reference: C.I.E. (modified) (Fig.27)
